---
name: Add a resource
about: Suggest a new community resource to add to the directory.
title: "Add: <organization name> (<zip>)"
labels: ["new-resource", "needs-review"]
---

<!--
Thanks for helping us grow the directory.

A maintainer will verify the details below and merge a PR adding this entry to
the knowledge base. Please only submit organizations with a public web reference
(website, public Facebook page, news article, official listing). We don't add
unverifiable entries.
-->

## Organization

**Name:** <!-- e.g. Hope Clinic Food Pantry -->

**Type:** <!-- pick one: food / medical / housing / safety / care / economy / education -->

**Subtype (optional):** <!-- e.g. pantry, free_clinic, dv_shelter, library -->

## Where

**Address:** <!-- street address -->

**City:**

**State:** <!-- 2-letter -->

**Zip:** <!-- 5-digit -->

## When & how to reach them

**Hours:** <!-- e.g. "Mon, Wed, Fri 9am–noon" -->

**Public phone or email:** <!-- must be a public org channel, not a person's private contact -->

**Website:** <!-- include https:// -->

## What they do (one or two sentences)

<!-- Plain-language description. -->

## Public reference

**Link to a public source confirming this exists:**
<!-- A maintainer will check this. Required. -->

## Optional details

**Services offered:** <!-- comma-separated, e.g. groceries, hot_meals, primary_care -->

**Populations served:** <!-- e.g. families, seniors, anyone -->

**Languages:** <!-- e.g. english, spanish -->

---

*By submitting, you confirm that the information above is publicly available and accurate to the best of your knowledge. We don't store any information about you — your GitHub username appears on this issue, that's it.*
